User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user (teacher, student, or both) in the system.

schoolName.description: The name of the school the user belongs to.

password.description: The user's password (hashed or plain as per current impl).

googleSynced.description: Whether the account is synced with Google Workspace.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

googleCalendarEventsStr.description: JSON stringified list of Google Calendar events.

googleClassroomActivitiesStr.description: JSON stringified list of Google Classroom activities.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

School.title: School
School.description: Represents a school registered in the system.

SchoolLink.title: SchoolLink
SchoolLink.description: Represents a request/approval link of students to his/her profile.

teacherId.description: The profile ID of the requesting teacher.

ApiKey.title: ApiKey
ApiKey.description: An integration API key associated with user.

name.description: The name of the API key.

Webhook.title: Webhook
Webhook.description: A webhook configuration for custom triggers.

users/{userId}.description: The collection of users, keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.

schools/{schoolId}.description: Represents schools registrable in the system.

school_links/{linkId}.description: The collection of student linkage requests made by teachers.

api_keys/{apiKeyId}.description: Collection of API keys for developer integration.

webhooks/{webhookId}.description: Collection of configured webhooks for custom event payloads.
